channel.title: AxxonSoft Limited — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by AxxonSoft Limited (axxonsoft).

item.title: CVE-2025-10227 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Lack of Encryption in Object Archive in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk) before 2.0.8
item.description: Missing Encryption of Sensitive Data (CWE-311) in the Object Archive component in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk) before 2.0.8 on Windows and Linux allows a local attacker with access to exported storage or stolen physical drives to extract sensitive ar…

item.title: CVE-2025-10226 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — PostgreSQL Upgrade from v10 to v17.4 in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk) 2.0.8 and earlier to Address Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Dependency on Vulnerable Third-Party Component (CWE-1395) in the PostgreSQL backend in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk) 2.0.8 and earlier on Windows and Linux allows a remote attacker to escalate privileges, execute arbitrary code, or cause denial-of-ser…

item.title: CVE-2025-10225 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Incorrect Memory Allocation in OpenSSL-Based Session Module in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk)
item.description: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer (CWE-119) in the OpenSSL-based session module in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk) 2.0.6 and earlier on Windows allows a remote attacker under high load conditions to cause applicatio…

item.title: CVE-2025-10224 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Incorrect Evaluation of LDAP Nested Groups during Login in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk)
item.description: Improper Authentication (CWE-287) in the LDAP authentication engine in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk) 2.0.2 and earlier on Windows allows a remote authenticated user to be denied access or misassigned roles via incorrect evaluation of nested LDAP group…

item.title: CVE-2025-10223 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Improper Session Cleanup on Role Removal in Web Admin Panel in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk)
item.description: Insufficient Session Expiration (CWE-613) in the Web Admin Panel in AxxonSoft Axxon One (C-Werk) prior to 2.0.3 on Windows allows a local or remote authenticated attacker to retain access with removed privileges via continued use of an unexpired sess…

item.title: CVE-2025-10222 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Sensitive Information Disclosure in Diagnostic Dumps in AxxonSoft Axxon One VMS
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor (CWE-200) in the diagnostic dump component in AxxonSoft Axxon One VMS (C-Werk) 2.0.0 through 2.0.1 on Windows allows a local attacker to obtain licensing-related information such as timestamp…

item.title: CVE-2025-10221 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Hardcoded Password Exposure in AxxonNet (C-WerkNet) ARP Agent Logs
item.description: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File (CWE-532) in the ARP Agent component in AxxonSoft Axxon One / AxxonNet / C-WerkNet 2.0.4 and earlier on Windows platforms allows a local attacker to obtain plaintext credentials via reading TRACE log f…

item.title: CVE-2025-10220 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Outdated Third-Party NuGet Packages in AxxonSoft Axxon One VMS 2.0.0 through 2.0.4
item.description: Use of Unmaintained Third Party Components (CWE-1104) in the NuGet dependency components in AxxonSoft Axxon One VMS 2.0.0 through 2.0.4 on Windows allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code or bypass security features via exploitation of vuln…
